# docpick
> Document in, structured JSON out. Schema-driven extraction with local OCR + LLM.
- `pip install docpick` — extras: `[paddle]` `[easyocr]` `[got]` `[mcp]` `[all]`
- Python >=3.11 | pydantic2, httpx, pypdfium2, click, rich
- 8 built-in schemas (invoice, receipt, bill_of_lading, purchase_order, kr_tax_invoice, bank_statement, id_document, certificate_of_origin) + custom JSON
- OCR engines: PaddleOCR, EasyOCR, GOT-OCR2.0, VLM | tiered auto-fallback
- Validation: check digits (Luhn, IBAN, ISO6346, KR biz#, AWB), cross-document
- Exports: `DocpickPipeline`, `DocpickConfig`, `ExtractionResult`, `OCRResult`
```python
from docpick import DocpickPipeline
from docpick.schemas import InvoiceSchema
result = DocpickPipeline().extract("invoice.pdf", schema=InvoiceSchema)
print(result.data, result.validation.is_valid)
```
- [Docs](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/docpick) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/docpick/) | [Full API](/llms-full.txt)
